query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure in athletic attire on a bright green grass field holding an oval-shaped ball, captured with radial motion streaks emanating from the center of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred figure in athletic attire on a bright green grass field holding an oval-shaped ball, rendered unrecognizable through extreme radial zoom blur that streaks outward from the center, dissolving the subject into abstract streaks of color and gesture that abandon representational clarity.
